calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name for an adult and for a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Petitioners Sue Allison Spector, was present in pro per and for the minor Manuel Roberto Spector-Garcia, was placed under oath and examined.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's father Eric Burnham Brewer was present and consented to the name change of the minor, signing the petition in open court.
Proof of Publication was filed.
No objections to the proposed change of names were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to Allison Sue Cuentos and Change of Name of the minor to Manuel Roberto Cuentos.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
